locator.quote: It dominates any cross-agent or cross-architecture P&L comparison

text: Eval action-sampling swing (~£200+/day on the same weights+day) dominates any cross-agent or cross-architecture P&L comparison.

locator.quote: even agents that look profitable are mostly riding lucky dice

text: The cash signal the GA ranks on is drowning in action-sampling noise: even agents that look profitable are mostly riding lucky dice.
Naked-pnl amplification is the loudest noise channel: differences in which pairs end up naked-into-the-off are multiplied by race outcomes.
